chemical_id.description: Stable chemical identifier shared with the request.
chemical_id.title: Chemical Id

preferred_name.description: Preferred chemical name when the evidence source also carries identity data.
preferred_name.title: Preferred Name

source_kind.description: What kind of upstream source produced the product-use evidence.
source_kind.title: Source Kind

review_status.description: Whether the evidence has been reviewed for downstream use.
review_status.title: Review Status

source_record_id.description: Optional upstream record identifier such as a dossier or registry ID.
source_record_id.title: Source Record Id

source_locator.description: Optional URL or logical locator for the upstream record.
source_locator.title: Source Locator

product_name.description: Optional product label or family name carried by the evidence source.
product_name.title: Product Name

product_subtype.description: Optional narrower product-use subtype carried by the evidence source.
product_subtype.title: Product Subtype

product_use_categories.description: Candidate product-use categories supported by the evidence source.
product_use_categories.title: Product Use Categories

physical_forms.description: Physical forms supported by the evidence source.
physical_forms.title: Physical Forms

application_methods.description: Application methods supported by the evidence source.
application_methods.title: Application Methods

retention_types.description: Retention or contact semantics supported by the evidence source.
retention_types.title: Retention Types

region_scopes.description: Regions where the product-use evidence is considered applicable.
region_scopes.title: Region Scopes

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdictions or regulatory programs that back the evidence source.
jurisdictions.title: Jurisdictions

physchem_summary.description: Optional physicochemical context preserved for downstream review.
physchem_summary.title: Physchem Summary

evidence_sources.description: Stable upstream evidence references backing the record.
evidence_sources.title: Evidence Sources

notes.description: Additional applicability or review notes preserved verbatim.
notes.title: Notes
